structured_payload_candidate.title: Stage Up Failsafe Condition (Primary-Only Parallel without WSE)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Primary-Only Parallel Chiller Plant without WSE
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Stage up if CHW DP is 2 psi < setpoint for 15 minutes or CHW supply temperature is 2°F > setpoint for 15 minutes.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Primary CHW Pump Staging (Headered Variable Speed, DP Control)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Primary CHW Pumps (Headered Variable Speed, DP Control)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Stage pumps based on CHWFR ratio; start next lag pump when CHWFR > (Number of Operating Pumps)/(N-0.03) for 10 minutes; shut off last lag pump when CHWFR ≤ (Number of Operating Pumps -1)/(N-0.03) for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: CHWFR > (Number of Operating Pumps)/(N-0.03) for 10 minutes (stage up); CHWFR ≤ (Number of Operating Pumps -1)/(N-0.03) for 10 minutes (stage down).
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Start next lag pump or shut off last lag pump accordingly.
configurable_values: N (number of pumps at design conditions)
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. Start the next lag pump whenever the following is true for 10 minutes: CHWFR > Number of Operating Pumps / N-.03 b. Shut off the last lag pump whenever the following is true for 10 minutes: CHWFR ≤ Number of Operating Pumps -1 / N-.03

structured_payload_candidate.title: Secondary CHW Pump Staging (Headered, DP Control)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Stage pumps based on SCHWFR; start next lag pump when SCHWFR > (Number of Operating Pumps)/(N-0.03) for 10 minutes; shut off last lag pump when SCHWFR < (Number of Operating Pumps -1)/(N-0.03) for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: SCHWFR > (Number of Operating Pumps)/(N-0.03) for 10 minutes (stage up); SCHWFR < (Number of Operating Pumps -1)/(N-0.03) for 10 minutes (stage down).
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Start next lag pump or shut off last lag pump accordingly.
configurable_values: N (number of pumps at design conditions)
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 1. Start the next lag pump whenever the following is true for 10 minutes: SCHWFR > Number of Operating Pumps / N-.03 2. Shut off the last lag pump whenever the following is true for 10 minutes: SCHWFR < Number of Operating Pumps -1 / N-.03

structured_payload_candidate.title: Coil Pump Staging (Poor Turndown)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Enable next lag pump if pump speed exceeds PumpSpeedMin*(Number of operating pumps+1)/Number of operating pumps+10% for 1 minute; disable last lag pump if speed falls below PumpSpeedMin for 1 minute.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Less than N pumps operating and pump speed exceeds threshold for 1 minute (stage up); pump speed falls below PumpSpeedMin for 1 minute (stage down).
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Enable next lag pump or disable last lag pump accordingly.
configurable_values: N (number of pumps at design coil flow)
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 1. Enable the next lag pump if less than N pumps are operating and pump speed exceeds the following for 1 minute: PumpSpeedMin*(Number of operating pumps +1)/Number of operating pumps+10% 2. Disable the last lag pump if pump speed falls below PumpSpeedMin for 1 minute.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Chiller Plant Requests from Coil Pumps
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Send Chiller Plant Request if pump speed > 95% until speed is minimum for 5 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Send 1 Request until speed command is minimum for 5 minutes. Else send 0 Requests.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 1. If the pump speed command is greater than 95%, send 1 Request until the speed command is minimum for 5 minutes. 2. Else if the pump speed command is less than 95%, send 0 Requests.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Head Pressure Control Mapping (WSE Disabled, with WSE Plant)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Chiller Head Pressure Control (WSE Plant, WSE Disabled)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When WSE disabled, map loop output: 0-50% resets HpTowerMaxSpd from 100% to minimum speed; 50-100% resets CW pump speed from Cw-DesPumpSpdStage to MinCWPspeed.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: From 0-50% loop output, reset HpTowerMaxSpd from 100% to minimum speed. From 50-100%, reset condenser water pump speed from Cw-DesPumpSpdStage to MinCWPspeed. Each enabled chiller's head pressure control valve shall be 100% open.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. From 0-50%, the loop output shall reset maximum cooling tower speed point, HpTowerMaxSpd, from 100% to minimum speed. b. From 50-100%, the loop output shall reset condenser water pump speed from Cw-DesPumpSpdStage to MinCWPspeed. c. Note: Each enabled chiller’s head pressure control valve shall be 100% open irrespective of loop output.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling Tower Bypass Valve - Open Condition
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If any CW pump on, all tower fans off, and CWST from tower < 40°F for 5 minutes, fully open tower bypass valve to basins.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Any condenser water pump on, all tower fans off, and CWST from tower falls below 40°F for 5 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Fully open the tower bypass valve to the tower basins.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If any condenser water pump is on, all tower fans are off, and CWST from the tower falls below 40°F for 5 minutes, fully open the tower bypass valve to the tower basins.

anchor_repair_reason: evidence_quote replaced with verbatim section heading line

structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling Tower Bypass Valve - Close Conditions
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Close bypass valve when WSE disabled and CWST rises above LIFTminX – 2°F above CHWST setpoint, or WSE enabled and CHWST rises to within 1°F of setpoint, or tower fans commanded on.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Any of: (1) WSE disabled, valve open ≥5 min, CWST rises LIFTminX – 2°F above CHWST setpoint; (2) WSE enabled, valve open ≥5 min, CHWST rises to within 1°F of setpoint; (3) Tower fans commanded on.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Close the valve to the tower basins.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Close the valve to the tower basins when any of the following are true: 1. The WSE is disabled, the valve has been open for at least 5 minutes, and CWST rises LIFTminX – 2°F above CHWST setpoint. 2. The WSE is enabled, the valve has been open for at least 5 minutes, and CHWST rises to within 1°F of CHWST setpoint. 3. Tower fans are commanded on (valve shall never be open when fans are on).

anchor_repair_reason: evidence_quote replaced with verbatim section heading line
